name: cashsnap_data_lifecycle_registry_v1
purpose: Single source of truth for which local data roots are working, diagnostic, intake, archive, or rejected so training and rendering do not accidentally use stale or wrong assets.

policy.note: Generated/large data roots are ignored by git; this registry is the tracked lifecycle map. Physical moves can happen after references are cleaned.

entries.purpose: Current real transfer judge; includes labeled positives and empty-label hard negatives.
Current-domain target-vs-reject MobileNet proposal-gate crop dataset from strict-best YOLO proposals; uses labeled real train/val positives plus class-13 WebGL UNKNOWN props as reject evidence.

Current-domain banknote-vs-background MobileNet proposal-gate crop dataset from strict-best YOLO proposals; treats operational and class-13 UNKNOWN labels as banknote evidence while low-IoU/random crops are reject/background.
Current-domain banknote-vs-background proposal-gate crop dataset with extra full-GT and thin/partial edge-positive crops to prevent gates from rejecting real partial USD/KHR notes.
Current-domain banknote-vs-background proposal-gate crop dataset with edge-positive target support plus reject proposals/random crops from semantic likely-true-empty train images.

Thirteen-class denomination crop classifier dataset with train crops from the current strict-best synthetic train mix and validation crops from real CashSnap val; diagnostic for crop-level synthetic transfer and proposal reranking.

Thirteen-class denomination crop classifier dataset with train crops from the strict-best synthetic mix plus teacher-accepted weak-USD alpha positives, validated on real CashSnap val; diagnostic for pure-synth USD denomination transfer.

Thirteen-class denomination crop classifier dataset with weak-USD-augmented synthetic train crops plus train-only edge/fragment variants, validated on real CashSnap val; diagnostic for pure-synth fragment-shaped denomination transfer.
Thirteen-class denomination crop classifier dataset with real CashSnap train crops and real val crops; diagnostic upper bound for proposal reclassification, not synthetic-transfer proof.
Thirteen-class denomination crop classifier dataset with up to 24 real CashSnap train crops per class and real val crops; diagnostic small-real calibration baseline.

Thirteen-class denomination crop classifier dataset combining current strict-best synthetic train crops with up to 24 real CashSnap train crops per class, validated on real CashSnap val; diagnostic for whether synthetic crops help after a small real-style anchor.

Thirteen-class denomination crop classifier dataset combining strict-best plus weak-USD synthetic crops with up to 24 real CashSnap train crops per class, validated on real CashSnap val; diagnostic for weak-USD support after a small real-style anchor.

Thirteen-class denomination crop classifier dataset combining strict-best plus weak-USD synthetic crops with up to 24 real CashSnap train crops per class, adding deterministic train-only edge/fragment crops to match detector proposal fragments; validated on real CashSnap val.
Teacher-pseudo-labeled train-split target-positive bridge mined from empty-label rows classified as suspect unlabeled USD/KHR targets; diagnostic anchor only until visual QA and transfer gates pass.

Rejected class-agnostic BANKNOTE detector view from current strict-best synthetic train mix plus real CashSnap val/test labels remapped to one class; same-budget test worsened product recall 0.7809 -> 0.6952 and no-box FNs 129 -> 196 despite cleaner precision/counts.
Raw Roboflow Khmer-US-currency v3 export; known clean 1782-image source, not direct training/eval until converted through a schema-aware bridge.
Raw Roboflow Khmer-US-currency v10 export from the Universe dataset/10 page; 2539 images, CC BY 4.0, no augmentation, not direct training/eval until converted through a schema-aware bridge.
Deduped v10+v3 Roboflow positive bridge converted to the current 13-class operational schema; cleaner KHR/USD-positive evaluator, not full official-taxonomy proof.
Deduped v10+v3 Roboflow positive bridge converted to the official 21-class schema; partial source preserving KHR_100 and exposing missing official denominations.
Active in-circulation USD/KHR cutout source for WebGL target-note renders.
Official-scope current-status cutout candidate bank; covers 20/21 official classes and needs review before any promotion.
Official-scope any-status cutout candidate bank; covers all 21 official classes but KHR_50 is out-of-circulation and not trainable without status resolution.
Train-split CashSnap real flat/full-bill cutout mining root; BEN2-transparent and alpha-rectified assets are probe-only until visual QA, source/label leakage review, and real-transfer gates pass.
Reviewed latest-design texture allowlist; prevents old/out-of-circulation or unreviewed note scans from entering trainable renders.
Official 21-class current-status texture candidate bank; 40 rows, missing KHR_50 front/back, pending review and not an active trainable allowlist.
Official 21-class any-status texture candidate bank; 42 rows with KHR_50 out-of-circulation, review/status diagnostic only.
Active WebGL recipe catalog.
Active synthetic data governance rules.
Planned external non-target currency/clutter negative bank; not trainable until local files, source/license metadata, and review pass.
Official-denomination source gaps blocking full-taxonomy synthetic rendering; currently records KHR_50 rights/status blocker and rejected watermarked/out-of-circulation candidates.
Current provisional real positive/stress/protected validation slices.
Overlay/crop review pack proving top empty-label false positives are realistic non-target banknotes, not blank backgrounds.
Bill-targeted auto-exposure/context transfer probe; useful clue but not promoted.

Real train-scene all-banknote replacement probe with balanced-cycle target assets, phone-source filtering, Poisson edge blend, inpaint tone, and no tiny visible labels; diagnostic only until source-remnant and real-transfer checks pass.

Same-source class-preserving phone-context replacement probe using balanced real-source scene selection with single-box scenes allowed; diagnostic until teacher-agreement and real-transfer checks decide it.
Tiny harness smoke for source-group-filtered same-source replacement on the USD trouble source groups (`usd_total`, `billsbank`); validates source-group accounting before any real-context rebuild.

Medium accepted-source same-class replacement probe for USD trouble source groups (`usd_total`, `billsbank`), balanced at 16 rows per USD class per source group; must pass teacher/visual gates before any same-budget transfer probe.
Single-box phone-context same-source replacement probe for the non-overlap base phase; exactly balanced at 8 labels/class and diagnostic until teacher agreement and transfer probes decide it.

Bal96 single-box phone-context same-source replacement probe with explicit rare-context source reuse for non-overlap transfer testing; diagnostic until teacher diagnostics and fixed-step real transfer decide it.

Balanced20 target-anchor appearance/contact probe with Poisson mixed blending, contact shadows, geometry scale 2.05, and minimum rendered short side 190 px; diagnostic only pending real-transfer and FP guardrails.

Balanced96 scaled target-anchor appearance/contact probe matching the old target-anchor leader row budget with Poisson mixed blending, contact shadows, geometry scale 2.05, and minimum rendered short side 190 px; diagnostic only until base-init and clean-checkpoint transfer checks pass.
Rejected/incomplete USD-only full-frame support render; the too-strict 0.50 area floor aborted after 58 rows without summary/data.yaml, so do not train from this root.

Rejected USD-only 32/class extent-heavy support pack: same-budget strictbest replacement improved localization/no-box modestly but lost full-test mAP50-95 0.5035 -> 0.4975, failed KHR guards, and worsened pre-gate background FPs.
Tiny phone-ISP smoke using the current scaled Poisson/contact target-anchor recipe; diagnostic visual/code-path check before the full balanced96 candidate.
Balanced96 phone-ISP target-anchor candidate matching the current strict leader except for final camera/ISP postprocess; diagnostic until fixed-step real transfer and FP guardrails decide it.

Current strict-best obligation smoke: weak USD target positives rendered on safe asian_currency/cashcountingxl unknown-style train backgrounds with billsbank train geometry anchors; diagnostic until visual QA and transfer/FP guards decide it.

Current strict-best obligation smoke: weak USD target positives rendered on strict no-note patches with billsbank train geometry/foreground-style anchors; pairs with unknown pressure only through a separate mix gate.
Current strict-best obligation alpha/preserve-luma smoke for weak USD positives on clean no-note patches; diagnostic label-preservation check against the Poisson cleanbg smoke.
Scaled 96/class alpha/preserve-luma weak-USD obligation pack using clean no-note backgrounds and billsbank train geometry; must be teacher-filtered before any transfer probe.

Alpha/preserve-luma clean-background recall-repair pack seeded from safeunknown80 train-side positive analogs for classes/source groups suppressed by unknown pressure; must be teacher-filtered before transfer probing.

Smoke target-positive scenes rendered onto six manually vetted foreign-note train negatives; diagnostic paired target/unknown anti-shortcut test, not trainable until visual, teacher, and transfer gates pass.

Balanced16 target-positive scenes rendered beside six manually vetted foreign-note train negatives with avoid-box placement; diagnostic paired target/unknown anti-shortcut probe, teacher-filter before transfer testing.

Teacher-accepted free-side paired foreign-note rows rematerialized with an explicit UNKNOWN_FOREIGN_NOTE class; structural target-vs-unknown objective probe, not promotable unless filtered-unknown transfer and background-FP guards pass.

Rejected Balanced96 target-anchor appearance/contact probe that replaced the 25-patch background bank with train-split semantic likely-true-empty full-frame CashSnap backgrounds; semantic true-empty background replacement damaged real transfer, so keep only as archive evidence unless a new objective is designed.

Rejected full 90-asset real-flat train-split cutout bank ablation using current poisson/contact/tone target-anchor settings; dropped strict-base test mAP50-95 0.5035 -> 0.3228 and increased guarded no-box misses 129 -> 215, so do not tune this branch without a new renderer/objective.
Zero-label unknown-currency diagnostic root.
Zero-label soft unknown-currency diagnostic root.
Negative WebGL unknown-banknote props exported as UNKNOWN_FOREIGN_NOTE boxes; renderer/label smoke for proposal or unknown-objective experiments only.
Medium WebGL negative root with unknown-banknote props exported as UNKNOWN_FOREIGN_NOTE boxes for direct unknown-objective go/stop probes; not target-positive training data by itself.
Small clean-context single-note WebGL smoke root for testing readable target notes with surrounding shop/table context before any trainable scale-up.
Small bridge-tone clean-context single-note WebGL smoke root testing real-bridge print contrast and camera dynamic-range repair after the flat clean-context smoke failed luma_p95.
Small local-tone clean-context single-note WebGL smoke root testing lighter print dynamic-range repair after off/default was flat and bridge-tone overcorrected.
64-image local-tone clean-context single-note diagnostic root to verify the smoke crop visual-gap pass across broader class/variant coverage before any model probe.
Raw downloaded/source scans; do not train or render directly except through reviewed current cutout and texture registries.
Mixed candidate/review/archive workspace; only explicitly working subroots are trainable.
Mixed generated roots; train only from registered configs/recipes with gates.
Mixed background/patch workspace; use only through reviewed background-bank policy.
Raw dataset intake; not a direct training source.
Intermediate processed data; not a direct training source unless promoted to working registry.
Manual capture/drop inbox; must be reviewed before promotion.
Historical configs kept for reference; not active planning.
Historical scripts kept for reference; do not use in active pipeline without re-review.
Historical notes and old model-brain content.
